name: Fairway Shores
about: Fairway Shores Golf Course is an executive 9-hole course in Zimmerman, Minnesota, offering a well-maintained layout suitable for golfers of all skill levels. The course features slight elevation changes, water hazards, and bunkers, providing a traditional golfing experience with shorter hole distances. On-site amenities include a golf simulator, allowing players to enjoy virtual golf in addition to the outdoor course. The venue is public and requires tee times, making it accessible while ensuring a structured playing environment.
why_golfers_like_it: On-site golf simulator for year-round play
Shorter hole distances suitable for all skill levels
Affordable pricing options with walking and cart rentals

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Players must bring their own golf clubs as there is no mention of club rentals available.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drink?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so outside food and drink may not be permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The course is a 9-hole executive layout, so playing 18 holes typically takes 2-3 hours depending on pace of play.

faq.question: Is this kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the course is described as suitable for golfers of all skill levels and families, making it kid-friendly.
